case_title: JANE F. CROSS VS. GEICO INSURANCE AGENCY, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,037.50 FILED BY CROSS, JANE F. AS TO DEFENDANT GEICO INSURANCE AGENCY, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-15-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS:CT CORPORATION SYSTEM) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CROSS, JANE F. AS TO DEFENDANT GEICO INSURANCE AGENCY, INC.

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT GEICO INSURANCE AGENCY, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-15-2015 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO OCT-01-2015 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. MEDIATION CONTINUED TO THE NEXT HEARING DATE. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT GEICO INSURANCE AGENCY, INC.
CORRESPONDENCE RECEIVED AND FILED BY PLAINTIFF CROSS, JANE F.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-01-2015 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JAN-26-2016 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. MEDIATION CONTINUED TO THE NEXT HEARING DATE. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT, ONLY. PLAINTIFF SENT A LETTER TO THE COURT EXPLAINING THAT SHE WAS UNDERGOING SURGERY AND NEEDED A CONTINUANCE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT GEICO INSURANCE AGENCY, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-26-2016 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO APR-05-2016 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 FOR CONTINUED MEDIATION. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT GEICO INSURANCE AGENCY, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-05-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-05-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-05-2016 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CROSS, JANE F. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GEICO INSURANCE AGENCY, INC. $1,037.50 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,082.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
